reviews.comment:
Fui a los baños los cuales me parecieron bastante malos en calidad de prestación, no habia jabón ni papel. Y el de mujer estaba igual de malo.

(Translated by Google)
I went to the restrooms, which I found to be quite poor in terms of service; there was no soap or toilet paper. And the women's restroom was just as bad.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHa3RpQmlnRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service for ACA members. Perhaps the best service in Patagonia. Thank you.
